description: Set in Vancouver, this 5-bed, 4-bath single family blends timeless design with everyday function. An open great-room flows to the outdoors, while the primary retreat offers a spa-style bath and generous closet. Minutes to shopping & dining — a rare offering in one of the region's most-wanted enclaves.
